metadata.description: Chaser — cut the cost of Claude Code (subscription + API key). 100% local, zero cloud.

plugins.name: chaser-lite
plugins.description: Audit the hidden cost of Claude Code (system-prompt tokens re-sent on every turn) and shrink it. Free, 100% local, zero dependencies, deliberately capped. The full version is ~5x more developed: Chaser Pro (orchestration engine, tamper-proof Merkle journal, semantic cache, Security Shield) — chaser-orchestrator.com/en.html
